title: Simon Property (SPG) Shares Rally 31.6% QTD: Here's Why
text: Robust leasing activity amid customers' growing preference for an in-person shopping experience and a focus on omnichannel retailing are the major reasons for Simon Property's (SPG) 31.6% quarter-to-date rise.

title: Simon Property: The Bulls Will Likely Prevail
text: A poor macroeconomic climate was the main contributor to Simon Property's negative returns this year. The company's core financial metrics are healthy and growing, setting the conditions for a recovery of its common shares next year.

title: My Top REIT Picks For 2023
text: This is the first time in over a decade that my top picks lost money. I'm always happy to show you the proof of my stock-market wins. But I have to be just as honest about the losses.

title: Why Investors Need to Take Advantage of These 2 Finance Stocks Now
text: Why investors should use the Zacks Earnings ESP tool to help find stocks that are poised to top quarterly earnings estimates.

title: Simon (SPG) Completes Jamestown's 50% Interest Acquisition
text: Simon Property (SPG) completes the acquisition of 50% interest in its earlier announced strategic partnership with Jamestown, a global real estate investment and management firm.

title: Simon Says, Sell Tanger Factory Outlets
text: We had a neutral view of Tanger Factory Outlets on our last coverage and suggested bullish investors buy Simon Property Group instead. We look at the performance of the two stocks and developments since that trade.

title: Simon Property: Cheaply Valued For The Long Run
text: Simon Property Group is benefiting from a retail renaissance, achieving record sales per square foot. It has a strong balance sheet and pays out a well-covered and growing dividend.

title: Realty Income Or Simon Property? Let's Ask Graham
text: Recent market volatilities created some interesting opportunities in the REIT sector. But sometimes, deciding among multiple options can be bewildering. Compared to Realty Income, Simon Property suffered a larger correction and therefore is trading at a lower valuation.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio November Update - Healthcare Services Group Gets The Boot
text: Estimated income for 2022 is up to a record $15,545, while the portfolio continues to crush the S&P 500. Buying was light as the market is up big from the October lows. I am skeptical of the market and expect better prices in the future.

title: 5 Strong Retail Stocks Worth Ringing Up
text: It's a month before Christmas and crumbs falling off vests, the traders have put down their last bets on retail stocks. The positions are hanging on desks with great care while out in the world the best deals sit there.
